raw_consumer_statement:
At the end of last year, i purchased a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX This XXXX XXXX ended up having a XXXX XXXX XXXX  in which the cover could not sit on it and seal. This required a whole new XXXX XXXX usually since the XXXX XXXX and cover have to be the ones that originally came together. Can not be mismatched with others. 

The merchant would not agree to helping pay the labor to move the internals from this XXXX XXXX  to a different one, or agree to paying the shipping to return this product. So i opened a bank dispute with American Express, and provided evidence of everything. I still somehow lost, and i was provided a merchant pdf resolution that stated they offered a refund which was not true. I decided to move on and fix the issue myself. I remachined the side of the cylinder head to work. 

Fast forward to XXXX, I try to turn the car on after getting the engine back from my mechanic. The car will not start properly and is throwing a code for the XXXX XXXX XXXX. I have my mechanic check and he finds that the XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX and faulty, the trigger is misaligned from factory and causes the motor to be off timing. This chewed up the journal in the XXXX XXXX  right beside this area. The company leaves me on seen and will not respond to my messages. I will attach proof of all this. 


My problem now is that American express will not acknowledge my new issue, they 3 times now have copy and pasted the same resolution from the first situation in XXXX without having the merchant reply to this new problem that I am having that is much more significant. I even called and escalated this through Amex and was told that they see that ive been having my dispute over looked and the response has no context to the current problem. I had an escalation agent TELL me this herself. And she PROMISED that this would not happen a third time. Well today, i uploaded even more evidence only to be responded with yet again - another copy and paste of the resolution from XXXX which has XXXX context to the current problem. 

This issue is costing me more than I paid for the cylinder head and it is causing me so much stress. I have not had my car driving for months because i can not get this resolved the right way with my bank. I am at a wits end and need help. 

I will attach my second explanation for the new problem that i provided for Amex as well for you to read.
